task: Suggest the correct lane behavior when Claude is exhausted.
context: Agent state: Claude is exhausted until a user-supplied reset time. Codex is live. Direct fallback agents are coordinator and codex_spark; codex_spark can fill a main seat. The UI has three main lanes and should show only live agents in those lanes.

expected.preferred_response_shape: lane behavior recommendation with fallback rule
must_avoid: put coordinator in a main lane unless eligible
